problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
hypothesis: Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation may resolve What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
